Cycling, canals & the Van Gogh Museum
Netherlands capital, with canals, cycle paths & museums with works by Van Gogh, Rembrandt & Vermeer.
Swedish capital with medieval old town
Sweden's capital, comprising 14 islands whose sites include an old town, palaces, museums & shops.
Greece’s capital, famous for preserved ancient ruins like the Acropolis citadel & Parthenon temple.
Catalan capital known for Gaudí’s whimsical architecture, the Gothic Quarter & tapas bars.
St. Anne's plus Ulster & Titanic museums
Northern Ireland's capital, with Ulster Museum, Titanic Belfast Museum & St. Anne's Cathedral.
Belgian capital & headquarters of the EU
Belgian capital & European Union headquarters, known for its Grand-Place & comic-strip murals.
France's capital, home to the Eiffel Tower, Louvre, Notre-Dame, sidewalk cafes & high fashion.
Denmark’s capital with Tivoli amusement park, royal palaces & iconic statue of “The Little Mermaid."
A castle, museums & the Book of Kells
The Republic of Ireland's capital, home to the Book of Kells, Dublin Castle & numerous museums.
Stylish German city with fashion boutiques, plus an Old Town with medieval landmarks & many pubs.
Royal Mile shops, castle & art festivals
Scotland’s capital, with hilltop Edinburgh Castle, Royal Mile shopping & big summer arts festivals.
German riverside city with European Central Bank, plus Goethe House, Städel & other notable museums.
Lake Geneva, Old Town & United Nations
Swiss city on Lake Geneva with United Nations headquarters, a cobbled Old Town & art museums.
Port city known for canals, lakes & parks, its Kunsthalle art museum & Reeperbahn nightlife.
Finnish capital known for its neoclassical cathedral, Design District shops & Suomenlinna sea fort.
Turkish city connecting Europe & Asia, known for architecture from the Byzantine & Ottoman empires.
England & U.K. capital, home to Buckingham Palace, St. Paul’s Cathedral, British Museum & Hyde Park.
Bavarian capital known for Oktoberfest, the Hofbräuhaus beer hall & the Residenz palace & museum.
German city with Kunstmuseum contemporary art, Wilhelma Zoo & Mercedes-Benz & Porsche museums.
Austrian capital with museums & Vienna State Opera performances, plus Schönbrunn & Hofburg palaces.
Poland’s capital with a rebuilt Old Town, noted museums & royal sites including Wilanów Palace.
Banking center on the Limmat River
Global finance center with Old Town on the Limmat River, home to Fraumünster church & Landesmuseum.
